tagline: Slowed, chopped, and hypnotically woozy for the late-night s
liner: This track slows time itself down to a sultry crawl. With vocals pitched low and broken into fragments, you are invited to sit in the quiet space between heartbeats. Heavy sub-bass rumbles beneath spacious swung drums, while detuned synths create a hazy, dreamlike veil over your introspection. It is an auditory exhale for those staring at their reflection after midnight. Let the Latin guitar loops and cello swells wash away the noise of the day. There is no rush here, only the gentle pressure to return within yourself.
worldCaption: A hazy southern club atmosphere where syrupy detuned synths meet chopped vocals on a late-night cruise through stagnant nostalgia.

bios.lead: Whispers that guide you home gently.
bios.back: Layers of harmony filling the quiet room softly.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking without missing a beat.
bios.perc: Adds dusty texture to every downbeat rhythmically.
bios.bass: Anchors the track with deep, heavy weight always.
bios.synth: Paints glowing colors in syrupy detuned hues perfectly.
bios.other: Weaves subtle textures through the hazy atmosphere quietly.
bios.guitar: Plays warm Latin loops that repeat and soothe.
